response.overview: The story follows Fariz (Nabil Aqil), who works part-time as a clown at a charity program entertaining shopping mall visitors to raise funds for a children's cancer association. Nisa (Yuna Rahim) is a girl who has completed her studies six months ago and is beginning to feel anxious as all the job interviews she has attended have failed to secure her permanent employment at any company. Nisa wants to be independent and find work outside her family's business but remains unsuccessful. Nisa's anxiety worsens when her phobia of clowns becomes more severe. It has disrupted her sleep after being chased by a clown at a shopping mall. Moreover, Nisa's father has an enemy who seeks to take revenge on him through Nisa. Although various incidents occur, there is a clown who is often at the scene of incidents to rescue Nisa. Who could this person be? Can Nisa and Fariz escape from the incidents that haunt them?
response.title: I Love You Mr Clown
